title: Local band Van Konings launches new album
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Local rock band Van...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Local rock band Van Konings recently made a comeback with the launch of their first English album, Sirens.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Local rock band Van Konings recently made a comeback with the launch of their first English album, Sirens."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Lead singer and songwriter Leon van Rensburg spoke to Mossel Bay Advertiser about the new album and their return to the music scene, hoping to connect not only with their local fans again, but to also grow a national fanbase."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The band consists of Leon, his brother, Morné, who is the guitarist, Jemin Koen on bass and Shaun Brown on drums. All of them are from Mossel Bay.","html":"The band consists of Leon, his brother, Morné, who is the guitarist, Jemin Koen on bass and Shaun Brown on drums. All of them are from Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Leon said the band had released an Afrikaans album, and then the Covid-19 pandemic hit. Following the lockdown, the band had wanted to start making music again, however, one of them had a long battle with an illness.","html":"Leon said the band had released an Afrikaans album, and then the Covid-19 pandemic hit. Following the lockdown, the band had wanted to start making music again, however, one of them had a long battle with an illness."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It is finally out, after some hurdles. All our songs are original. We make music not for a living, but because it is a passion for us,\" Leon said.","html":"\"It is finally out, after some hurdles. All our songs are original. We make music not for a living, but because it is a passion for us,\" Leon said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said one of his personal favourites on the album is \"Cadillac on Mars\", which they are in the process of making a music video for. The album is available on all music streaming sites such as Spotify and YouTube Music.","html":"He said one of his personal favourites on the album is \"Cadillac on Mars\", which they are in the process of making a music video for. The album is available on all music streaming sites such as Spotify and YouTube Music."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Leon said the band was extremely excited when one of their songs, \"Hold On\", was recently played on Algoa FM. He said while they are not doing live shows at this point, they are excited to be making music and videos for their fans.","html":"Leon said the band was extremely excited when one of their songs, \"Hold On\", was recently played on Algoa FM. He said while they are not doing live shows at this point, they are excited to be making music and videos for their fans."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Find music videos for several of their songs on their YouTube channel, Van Konings, and for updates on the band, follow their Facebook page with the same name.","html":"Find music videos for several of their songs on their YouTube channel, Van Konings, and for updates on the band, follow their Facebook page with the same name."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Local band Van Konings launches new album
